Does the availability number on the application match that in Sages?
Does the project name on the application match that in Sages?
Have the correct applications been submitted for the permits being requested?
Does the requested flow on the permit application match that of the availability flow?
Has the permittee and EOR signed on all applicable items?
Based on location, pipe size, and presence/lack of on-site sewer, has the correct permit been applied for?
Is the permittee an Agent or Authorized Representative?
If the permittee is listed as Agent or Authorized Representative, is an LOA on file?
Is the contact information full and correct for both the EOR and Permittee?
Has the EOR used their official seal on the application in all applicable areas?
Within the project design and construction checklists, have all applicable items been initialed or listed as N/A?
For all items listed as N/A, has the EOR explained why they are listed that way?
If the project entails water and sewer permit applications, does the flow match?
For FDEP Sewer permit applications involving public and private owned utilities, is a second page 10 included?
